_comment: Cron schedules for the four critical background jobs.
Trading-b0j: pre-fix none of these had a Vercel schedule, so a deploy
without an external cron caller (system cron / Cloud Scheduler) ran with
ZERO automated risk monitoring or order/position-pnl drainage. Adding
explicit schedules here makes the safety net Vercel-self-sufficient.
- risk-monitoring: every minute (Vercel cron minimum on Pro plan).
Sub-minute frequencies require an external scheduler — see
- order-worker: every minute. Drains queued orders that the long-running
worker may have missed during a deploy/restart window.
- position-pnl-worker: every minute. Same backstop role for PnL updates.
- watchlist-expiry-sweep: hourly. Deletes expired derivative items.
Vercel Hobby plan does NOT support these schedules — production runs on
the Pro plan or via the EC2/Docker long-running worker variant.
